description: Immutable RKB evidence snapshot containing CCW dictionary specifications, types, constraints, and valid values for CMS 2021 baseline files.

BENE_ID.name: BENE_ID
BENE_ID.label: Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID
BENE_ID.description: Unique identifier for the beneficiary assigned by CCW.

BENE_BIRTH_DT.name: BENE_BIRTH_DT
BENE_BIRTH_DT.label: Beneficiary Date of Birth
BENE_BIRTH_DT.description: Date of birth of the beneficiary in YYYYMMDD format.

BENE_DEATH_DT.name: BENE_DEATH_DT
BENE_DEATH_DT.label: Beneficiary Date of Death
BENE_DEATH_DT.description: Date of death of the beneficiary if deceased; null otherwise.

CLM_ID.name: CLM_ID
CLM_ID.label: Claim Control Number
CLM_ID.description: Unique identifier for a claim submitted by a provider or facility.

CLM_FROM_DT.name: CLM_FROM_DT
CLM_FROM_DT.label: Claim Start Date
CLM_FROM_DT.description: The date of service start for carrier line or admission/start for outpatient claim.

CLM_THRU_DT.name: CLM_THRU_DT
CLM_THRU_DT.label: Claim Through Date
CLM_THRU_DT.description: The date of service end for carrier line or discharge/end for outpatient claim.

ICD_DGNS_CD1.name: ICD_DGNS_CD1
ICD_DGNS_CD1.label: Primary Diagnosis Code (ICD-10-CM)
ICD_DGNS_CD1.description: Primary ICD-10-CM diagnosis code associated with the claim event.

CLM_ADMSN_DT.name: CLM_ADMSN_DT
CLM_ADMSN_DT.label: Claim Admission Date
CLM_ADMSN_DT.description: The date the beneficiary was admitted to an inpatient facility.

NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT.name: NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT
NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT.label: Beneficiary Discharge Date
NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT.description: The date the beneficiary was discharged from an inpatient facility.

CLM_PMT_AMT.name: CLM_PMT_AMT
CLM_PMT_AMT.label: Claim Payment Amount
CLM_PMT_AMT.description: Total amount paid by Medicare for the claim.

CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT.name: CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT.label: Utilization Day Count
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT.description: Number of covered days of inpatient care utilized.

PDE_ID.name: PDE_ID
PDE_ID.label: Prescription Drug Event ID
PDE_ID.description: Unique identifier for a Part D Prescription Drug Event.

NCVD_DAYS_CNT.name: NCVD_DAYS_CNT
NCVD_DAYS_CNT.label: Non-Covered Days Count
NCVD_DAYS_CNT.description: Number of non-covered stay days during a SNF claim stay.

CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND.name: CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND
CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND.label: HHA Low Utilization Payment Adjustment Indicator
CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND.description: Indicator for Low Utilization Payment Adjustment on HHA claims.

DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT.name: DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT
DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT.label: DME Line Item Count
DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT.description: Number of line items on Durable Medical Equipment claim.

LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD.name: LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD
LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD.label: CMS Type of Service Code
LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD.description: Type of service code for DME claim line.

HOSPICE_TERMINAL_DIAG_CD.name: HOSPICE_TERMINAL_DIAG_CD
HOSPICE_TERMINAL_DIAG_CD.label: Terminal Diagnosis ICD-10 Code
HOSPICE_TERMINAL_DIAG_CD.description: Primary ICD-10 diagnosis code for hospice care terminal condition.

BENE_MDCR_PAY_AMT.name: BENE_MDCR_PAY_AMT
BENE_MDCR_PAY_AMT.label: Beneficiary Medicare Payment Total Amount
BENE_MDCR_PAY_AMT.description: Annual total Medicare payments made on behalf of beneficiary.

BENE_TOT_PAY_AMT.name: BENE_TOT_PAY_AMT
BENE_TOT_PAY_AMT.label: Beneficiary Total Payment Amount
BENE_TOT_PAY_AMT.description: Annual total payments (Medicare + Beneficiary + Third-Party) for beneficiary.

BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT.name: BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT
BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT.label: Beneficiary Inpatient Deductible Amount
BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT.description: Annual inpatient deductible amount paid by beneficiary.

BENE_CVRD_DYS_CNT.name: BENE_CVRD_DYS_CNT
BENE_CVRD_DYS_CNT.label: Beneficiary Total Covered Days Count
BENE_CVRD_DYS_CNT.description: Annual count of covered inpatient and SNF stay days for beneficiary.

BENE_PTD_TRCC_AMT.name: BENE_PTD_TRCC_AMT
BENE_PTD_TRCC_AMT.label: Beneficiary Part D Total Gross Covered Drug Cost Amount
BENE_PTD_TRCC_AMT.description: Annual total gross covered drug cost amount under Part D for beneficiary.

BENE_PTD_MOOP_AMT.name: BENE_PTD_MOOP_AMT
BENE_PTD_MOOP_AMT.label: Beneficiary Part D True Out-of-Pocket Cost Amount
BENE_PTD_MOOP_AMT.description: Annual true out-of-pocket payment amount under Part D for beneficiary.

BENE_HI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.name: BENE_HI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS
BENE_HI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.label: Beneficiary Part A Total Coverage Months
BENE_HI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.description: Annual total months of Part A (Hospital Insurance) coverage.

BENE_SMI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.name: BENE_SMI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS
BENE_SMI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.label: Beneficiary Part B Total Coverage Months
BENE_SMI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.description: Annual total months of Part B (Supplementary Medical Insurance) coverage.

BENE_HMO_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.name: BENE_HMO_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS
BENE_HMO_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.label: Beneficiary HMO Total Coverage Months
BENE_HMO_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.description: Annual total months of HMO coverage.

BENE_PTD_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.name: BENE_PTD_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS
BENE_PTD_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.label: Beneficiary Part D Total Coverage Months
BENE_PTD_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS.description: Annual total months of Part D coverage.

SP_ARTHGLAU.name: SP_ARTHGLAU
SP_ARTHGLAU.label: Rheumatoid Arthritis / Osteoarthritis Indicator
SP_ARTHGLAU.description: Chronic condition indicator for Rheumatoid Arthritis or Osteoarthritis.

SP_ATRIALF.name: SP_ATRIALF
SP_ATRIALF.label: Atrial Fibrillation Indicator
SP_ATRIALF.description: Chronic condition indicator for Atrial Fibrillation.

constraints.description: CLM_FROM_DT must be less than or equal to CLM_THRU_DT.
CLM_ADMSN_DT must be less than or equal to NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT.
BENE_ID on Carrier, Outpatient, Inpatient, PDE, SNF, HHA, DME, Hospice, or MBSF record must exist in Beneficiary Summary file.
DAYS_SUPLY_NUM and TOT_RX_CST_AMT on PDE events must be non-negative.
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT and NCVD_DAYS_CNT on SNF claims must be non-negative.
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT on HHA claims must be non-negative.
DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT on DME claims must be greater than or equal to 1.
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT on Hospice claims must be non-negative.
Chronic Condition Indicators (SP_*) on MBSF records must be within valid set {'0', '1', '2'}.
Payment amounts and covered days on MBSF Cost & Use records must be non-negative.
constraints.rule: BENE_MDCR_PAY_AMT >= 0 AND BENE_TOT_PAY_AMT >= 0 AND BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT >= 0 AND BENE_CVRD_DYS_CNT >= 0

constraints.description: Part D covered drug cost and out-of-pocket amounts on MBSF Part D records must be non-negative.
Part A, B, HMO, and D coverage months on MBSF Base records must be between 0 and 12 inclusive.
constraints.rule: BENE_HI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS BETWEEN 0 AND 12 AND BENE_SMI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS BETWEEN 0 AND 12 AND BENE_HMO_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS BETWEEN 0 AND 12 AND BENE_PTD_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS BETWEEN 0 AND 12

constraints.description: Other Chronic Condition Indicators (SP_*) on MBSF Other Chronic records must be within valid set {'0', '1', '2'}.
